vBRIEFInfo.description: Story vBRIEF for #1620 (vBRIEF 0.6 conformance: Category A core-field migrations + verify:vbrief-conformance gate). Category B namespacing is explicitly deferred (depends on upstream vBRIEF #12). Unblocks statusreport #34.

plan.title: vBRIEF 0.6 conformance: Category A migrations + verify:vbrief-conformance gate

narratives.Description: directive is the vBRIEF reference implementation but emits bare, non-namespaced fields that are neither spec-core nor x-directive/-namespaced. That drift produced the statusreport #34 false-RED. This story ships the no-upstream-dependency half of #1620: (A) migrate misused/misspelled CORE fields to their correct core home across the corpus, and (B) add a verify:vbrief-conformance gate that fails task check + pre-commit when any vBRIEF carries a bare key outside spec-core / x-directive/ / x-vbrief/. Category B (plan.policy -> x-directive/policy, completedNote) is DEFERRED to a follow-up because it depends on upstream vBRIEF #12 (x-<consumer>/ namespace ratification + round-trip preservation); the gate ships with a documented temporary allow-list for plan.policy and plan.completedNote, and a follow-up issue is filed to remove the allow-list once #12 lands.
narratives.ImplementationPlan: 1. scripts/vbrief_migrate_conformance.py: idempotent corpus migration over vbrief/**/*.vbrief.json using pathlib UTF-8 read/write. Category A only: plan.planRef -> append a plan.references[] entry of type x-vbrief/github-issue (dedupe against existing refs) then delete planRef (~98 files); item-level description -> narrative (~9); item-level narratives (plural, the copy-paste typo) -> narrative (~7). Preserve key order and trailing newline; report a per-file diff summary; --check mode for dry-run. 2. scripts/verify_vbrief_conformance.py: scan every tracked vbrief/**/*.vbrief.json; at document, plan, and item level flag any key that is not (a) a known 0.6 spec-core field, (b) prefixed x-directive/, or (c) prefixed x-vbrief/. Ship a small ALLOW_LIST = {plan.policy, plan.completedNote} documented as TEMPORARY pending vBRIEF #12 with the follow-up issue number inline. Three-state exit (0 clean / 1 violations / 2 config error). Honor an --allow-list override path mirroring scripts/verify_encoding.py. 3. Wire task verify:vbrief-conformance into tasks/verify.yml + the task check aggregate, and add --staged invocation to .githooks/pre-commit. 4. Run the migration, commit the ~114 file fixes, confirm the gate is green on the migrated corpus. 5. File the Category B follow-up issue (depends-on vBRIEF #12) and reference it in the allow-list comment. 6. tests/cli/test_verify_vbrief_conformance.py + tests/cli/test_vbrief_migrate_conformance.py: cover a clean corpus (exit 0), a planted bare-key violation (exit 1), the allow-list carve-out, --check idempotency, and the planRef->references migration with dedupe.
narratives.UserStory: As a maintainer of the vBRIEF reference implementation, I want directive's own corpus to be conformant (core-correct or x-namespaced, never bare) and a gate that fails the build on any new bare key, so that directive stops drifting from the standard it anchors and the statusreport #34 false-RED pattern cannot recur.
narratives.Traces: issue #1620; unblocks cross-repo statusreport #34; Category B depends on upstream vBRIEF #12; conceptual companions directive #1618 / #1607 (source-of-truth vs projection).

items.title: Category A core-field migration across the vBRIEF corpus

narrative.Acceptance: Running scripts/vbrief_migrate_conformance.py creates a deduped plan.references[] x-vbrief/github-issue entry from plan.planRef, updates item description to narrative and item narratives(plural) to narrative across all vBRIEF files; when re-run with --check it exits 0 and mutates no other fields.

items.title: verify:vbrief-conformance gate with temporary Category B allow-list

narrative.Acceptance: task verify:vbrief-conformance fails (exit 1) when any vBRIEF carries a bare key outside spec-core / x-directive/ / x-vbrief/ at document, plan, or item level; plan.policy and plan.completedNote are carved out via a documented TEMPORARY allow-list citing the Category B follow-up issue.

items.title: Wire the gate into task check + pre-commit; corpus stays green

narrative.Acceptance: When wired into task check and the .githooks/pre-commit --staged step, verify:vbrief-conformance validates the migrated corpus and task check passes green; the Category B follow-up issue (depends-on vBRIEF #12) is filed and referenced in the allow-list comment.

expected_outputs: Category A bare keys eliminated from the corpus (planRef/description/narratives migrated)
task verify:vbrief-conformance gates task check + pre-commit, three-state exit
Category B follow-up issue filed (depends-on vBRIEF #12)

references.title: Issue #1620: vBRIEF 0.6 conformance: rein in bare non-standard fields + verify:vbrief-conformance gate
